title: angelica glabra
intro: Angelica glabra, also known as Dong quai's lookalike or simply Angelica, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Angelica glabra include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve blood circulation, and support the immune system. Angelica glabra can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
